creator: sarawgi.aditya@gmail.com
text:
Hi,

I think this problem persists only on amd64. I have rewritten some parts 
of ext2fs and I feel this problem will not occur in the new 
implementation. I don't have a merge for 7.x release for the new code 
but if you want to try the code on 8.x mail me. Thanks!

-- 
Aditya Sarawgi
